## Author Checklist

- [] I have reviewed my own code before requesting review
- [] Linting passes with no errors
- [] A Storybook story has been added if this is a new component
- [] A test has been added if this PR contains new logic

## Reviewer Checklist

- [] Code is clear and understandable
- [] Logic and edge cases have been considered
- [] No obvious performance or security concerns
